data.title: Synthetix Drops Derive Deal After Community Feedback Sparks Rethink
data.description:
TL;DR Synthetix canceled the Derive acquisition after pushback from both communities, who questioned the deal’s value and swap terms. The proposal involved swapping 27 DRV for each SNX with an initial lockup, plus a 170 million SNX token issuance that raised concerns. Derive, which had already severed ties with Synthetix’s infrastructure, will continue operating independently. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/synthetix-drops-derive-deal-after-community-feedback-sparks-rethink/

In response to concerns about underrepresentation, the Foundation has delegated 20 million ADA each—a total of 140 million ADA—to seven […] The post Cardano Foundation Delegates 140M ADA to Builders in Push for Inclusive Governance appeared first on Coindoo.

data.title: Details of the latest Aethir node repurchase plan revealed, eATH will be used as a voucher to participate in Aethir Season2&3 AirDrop
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Aethir recently announced the launch of the Checker node repurchase plan, allowing its node holders to sell their node licenses back to Aethir and obtain corresponding benefits. The repurchase plan will be officially launched on May 27, 25. Checker node holders can sell their node NFTs back to the Aethir Foundation through the official link and obtain the consideration eATH (EigenATH). The token has a 1-year lock-up period and a redemption period of June 13, 2026. Once the redemption process is entered, eATH will be released linearly on a 30-day basis and converted to ATH.
eATH will be used to support Aethir's decentralized cloud computing infrastructure. Through the repurchase, users hold equity in the form of eATH, which essentially supports the access of a new batch of GPU computing power. The repurchase price is not fixed and will fluctuate according to market conditions and the repurchase ratio. Early participants will receive additional rewards.

data.description:

6:00–9:30 pm — Main dinner

data.title: Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Bill Clears Texas Legislature
data.description:
Texas is poised to become the third U. S. state to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve after the legislature passed SB 21 with bipartisan support.

The post Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Bill Clears Texas Legislature first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/05/22/texas-strategic-bitcoin-reserve-passes/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=texas-strategic-bitcoin-reserve-passes

data.title: Coinbase hacker sold 8,775 ETH for 23.23 million DAI in the past 2 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, in the past 2 hours, the hacker who stole funds from Coinbase users continued to sell 8,775 ETH in exchange for 23.23 million DAI.
Since 8 am this morning, the hacker who stole funds from Coinbase users has transferred a total of 26,347 ETH through THORChain, and then sold it for 68.18 million DAI, with an average selling price of US$2,588.

data.title: H100 Group becomes the first listed company in Sweden to establish Bitcoin reserves, has purchased 4.39 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News H100 Group announced that it has purchased 4.39 bitcoins, becoming the first publicly listed company in Sweden to establish a bitcoin reserve. (Bitcoin Magazine)

data.title: Standard Chartered analyst: BTC may reach $200,000 by the end of the year and $500,000 by 2028
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Geoffrey Kendrick, global head of digital asset research at Standard Chartered Bank, said that all predicted catalysts are consistent with the rise of the asset, and more positive momentum is expected in prices in the coming weeks and months, but caution is also recommended due to insufficient market liquidity. Geoffrey Kendrick added: "My prediction for Bitcoin is that the number of Bitcoins will reach 120,000 by the end of the second quarter, 200,000 by the end of 2025, and 500,000 by the end of 2028. Everything is under control." 
Analysts pointed out that the "Buy in May" strategy performs well in the current market. The price of Bitcoin broke through $111,000, setting a record high. In addition, the market demand for Bitcoin options has surged, showing investors' strong interest in future trends. Analysts believe that the current market sentiment is positive and capital inflows continue, which may drive Bitcoin prices further up. However, some experts also remind investors to pay attention to market volatility and potential risks. (The Block)

During the event, you can share exclusive token rewards by trading BANK, AGT, REX, PUFFER and FHE in Binance Wallet (without private key) or through Binance Alpha.
Event time: 00:00 on May 23, 2025 to 00:00 on June 6, 2025 (Eastern Time Zone 8).

data.title: Which senators invest in crypto? 11 lawmakers have blockchain-related investments
data.description:
As the question of stablecoin regulation heats up in the US Senate, so has the issue of which members are personally invested in cryptocurrencies and cryptocurrency firms. On May 19, the Senate voted to invoke cloture and move ahead with the GENIUS Act, which would provide a regulatory framework for stablecoins. The measure passed 66-32, with 16 Democrats supporting the bill. Democratic concerns over corruption and politicians’ ties to cryptocurrency firms made the bipartisan move controversial
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/senators-invest-crypto-blockchain-related-investments?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Genius Group resumes Bitcoin reserve construction, recently increased holdings by 24.5 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Artificial intelligence education group Genius Group (NYSE American: GNS) announced that it has resumed the construction of Bitcoin reserves after the US Court of Appeals lifted the ban. The company recently increased its holdings by 24.5 BTC, and currently holds 85.5 BTC (total cost of US$8.5 million, average price of US$99,700 per coin), an increase of 40% from the previous. The company reiterated that it will continue to increase its holdings to the goal of 1,000 BTC as planned in November 2024. CEO Roger Hamilton said that rebuilding Bitcoin reserves is a key part of the company's 2025 development strategy, aimed at promoting AI, Bitcoin and community education. (GlobeNewswire)

data.title: JZXN, a US-listed auto dealer, has approved its Bitcoin reserve plan
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The board of directors of automobile dealer JZXN approved the Bitcoin reserve plan, intending to purchase 1,000 Bitcoins in the next year through a combination of additional stock issuance and cash. The company said the move is aimed at optimizing the asset structure and using Bitcoin's market liquidity and value-added potential to hedge risks. According to the announcement, the acquisition funds will come from the timely issuance of additional stock fundraising, combined with its own funds and potential external financing. JZXN believes that incorporating Bitcoin into the company's asset portfolio can not only effectively diversify investment risks, but also bring potential long-term benefits to the company (Prnewswire)

data.title: Genius Group Resumes Bitcoin Reserve Expansion Following Court Decision
data.description:
According to PANews, Genius Group, an AI education company listed on NYSE American under the ticker GNS, has resumed its efforts to build a Bitcoin reserve after a U.S. appeals court lifted a previous injunction. The company recently increased its holdings by 24.5 BTC, bringing its total to 85.5 BTC, with a total cost of $8.5 million and an average price of $99,700 per Bitcoin. This marks a 40% increase in their Bitcoin holdings.

Genius Group has reaffirmed its commitment to reaching a target of 1,000 BTC by November 2024. In February 2025, the company held 440 BTC but was forced to sell most of its holdings between February 14 and May 6 due to a temporary court order. In response, Genius Group has filed a revised RICO lawsuit in the Southern District of Florida.

The company plans to launch a Bitcoin Academy by the end of May, featuring notable figures such as Saifedean Ammous, author of "The Bitcoin Standard." CEO Roger Hamilton emphasized that rebuilding the Bitcoin reserve is a crucial part of the company's 2025 development strategy, aimed at advancing AI, Bitcoin, and community education.

data.title: James Wynn's 10x SUI long position has a floating loss of $700,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, due to the continuous decline of SUI, James Wynn's 10x SUI long order has a floating loss of US$700,000, becoming his only losing position in Hyperliquid. In the past 20 minutes, he has added US$4 million. The current position is as follows: 
-Position size: 4853135.59 SUI, about US$18.58 million
-Opening price: US$3.97064
-Current floating loss: US$700,000

data.title: Bitcoin Miner MARA Allocates 500 BTC to Two Prime to Expand Profit Strategy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin mining company MARA Holdings announced that it has expanded its cooperation with SEC-registered Bitcoin investment advisor Two Prime, and will allocate 500 BTC (from its 48,137 BTC reserves) to its managed income strategy. Two Prime has previously provided MARA with a Bitcoin-backed loan. MARA plans to further expand its Bitcoin holdings through a $2 billion stock offering. Two Prime creates returns for institutional investors through customized Bitcoin derivatives strategies and has $2.5 billion in capital. (The Block)

data.title: Kraken to Offer Over 50 Tokenized Stocks and ETFs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news: Cryptocurrency exchange Kraken will provide more than 50 tokenized stocks and ETFs, covering stocks of companies such as Apple, Tesla, and Nvidia.

data.title: Sui Network Faces $200 Million Theft Challenge
data.description: According to Odaily, SlowMist's Cosine reported on the X platform that approximately $200 million was stolen from the Sui Network's Cetus. The hackers face difficulties in converting the stolen funds into more stable assets and transferring them across networks. Some traces of the hackers have already been obtained.

data.title: SlowMist Cosine: We have obtained some traces of Cetus hackers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: SlowMist Yuxian posted on the X platform that about $200 million was stolen from Cetus on the Sui network. It is not easy for hackers to convert it into more stable assets and then take it all away. Some traces of the hackers have been obtained.
